titleEn: Targan expands into Peru through WingScan™ partnership with Redondos
titleZh: Targan通过WingScan™与Redondos合作进入秘鲁市场
summaryZh: Targan公司宣布与秘鲁最大禽肉生产商Redondos合作，在秘鲁部署其WingScan™自动雏鸡性别鉴定技术。该系统利用先进成像和机器学习，以超过97%的准确率每小时处理多达16万只雏鸡，已在全球安装超过55套，处理超过20亿只鸡。此次合作标志着Targan进入南美市场，推动家禽孵化自动化在拉丁美洲的扩展，应对劳动力代际转型和规模化生产需求。
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了AI和机器视觉在禽业性别鉴定中的成熟应用，为智慧畜牧行业提供了高精度、高吞吐量的自动化解决方案案例，对面临劳动力转型和规模化挑战的生产商具有直接参考价值。
contentFull: Equipment & innovation Hardware Company/products Targan expands into Peru through WingScan™ partnership with Redondos The partnership brings Targan’s technology to South America, building on its success in the US and Europe 16 March 2026 2 minute read By: TARGAN South America Targan, a leading animal AgTech company, has announced a new agreement with Redondos S.A., one of Peru’s largest poultry producers, to implement its WingScan™ automated chick‑sexing technology. The systems are scheduled for installation in 2026, marking Targan’s entry into the Peruvian market and further expansion of hatchery automation across Latin America.WingScan has already been adopted by poultry producers across North America and Europe, where the technology is helping modernize hatchery operations through greater precision, consistency, and throughput. Its expansion into South America reflects growing global demand for advanced automation solutions that support a more efficient and resilient poultry supply chain.Carlos Bautista, Key Account Manager for Latin America at Targan, said: “Across Latin America, the poultry industry is navigating a generational shift in its workforce while continuing to scale production. Technologies like WingScan give producers a practical way to bring greater consistency, precision, and reliability to hatchery operations. Redondos has long been recognized as one of Peru’s leading poultry companies, and with this step the company is well positioned to further strengthen its operations while advancing the adoption of automated sexing in the region.”Jorge Belevan, General Manager at Redondos commented: “At Redondos, we are committed to adopting technologies that support reliable, efficient production. This collaboration allows us to introduce automation that directly benefits our teams and our customers. Importantly, it reflects our ongoing wider effort to modernize our processes and contribute to the advancement of poultry production in Peru.”On Targan’s wider growth strategy, the company’s CEO and Founder, Ramin Karimpour, added: “Latin America plays a major role in the global poultry market, with producers supplying chicken to markets around the world. The adoption of our technology in Peru is an important step as we continue expanding our platform globally and supporting producers with scalable automation designed for the next generation of poultry production.”WingScan automates chick sexing using advanced imaging and machine learning, sorting birds with over 97% accuracy while processing up to 160,000 chicks per hour. Since launching in 2023, the system has sexed more than two billion birds globally, now processing over 35 million chicks each week, and has more than 55 systems installed worldwide, reinforcing Targan’s position as the leader in automated chick sexing technology.Established in 1973, Redondos S.A. is an integrated poultry and pork producer operating across the full value chain, from feed manufacturing to processing and distribution. The company offers chicken, turkey, and pork products under well‑known Peruvian brands and supplies both retail and foodservice customers nationwide. Redondos is recognized for its focus on quality, food safety, and responsible production. translationZh:
Targan，一家领先的动物农业科技公司，宣布与秘鲁最大的禽肉生产商之一Redondos S.A.达成新协议，将部署其WingScan™自动雏鸡性别鉴定技术。这些系统计划于2026年安装，标志着Targan进入秘鲁市场，并进一步扩展拉丁美洲的孵化自动化。

WingScan已被北美和欧洲的禽肉生产商采用，该技术通过更高的精度、一致性和吞吐量，帮助现代化孵化运营。其向南美的扩张反映了全球对先进自动化解决方案日益增长的需求，这些方案支持更高效、更有韧性的家禽供应链。

Targan拉丁美洲大客户经理Carlos Bautista表示：“在整个拉丁美洲，家禽行业正经历劳动力代际转型，同时继续扩大生产规模。像WingScan这样的技术为生产商提供了一种实用方式，为孵化运营带来更高的一致性、精度和可靠性。Redondos长期以来一直被公认为秘鲁领先的家禽公司之一，通过这一步，该公司有望进一步加强其运营，同时推动自动性别鉴定技术在该地区的采用。”

Redondos总经理Jorge Belevan评论道：“在Redondos，我们致力于采用支持可靠、高效生产的技术。这次合作使我们能够引入自动化，直接惠及我们的团队和客户。重要的是，这反映了我们持续现代化流程、为秘鲁家禽生产进步做出贡献的更广泛努力。”

关于Targan更广泛的增长战略，公司CEO兼创始人Ramin Karimpour补充道：“拉丁美洲在全球家禽市场中扮演着重要角色，生产商向全球市场供应鸡肉。我们的技术在秘鲁的采用是重要一步，因为我们继续在全球扩展平台，并为下一代家禽生产提供可扩展的自动化解决方案。”

WingScan利用先进成像和机器学习实现雏鸡性别鉴定自动化，以超过97%的准确率分拣禽只，每小时处理多达16万只雏鸡。自2023年推出以来，该系统已在全球对超过20亿只鸡进行性别鉴定，目前每周处理超过3500万只雏鸡，全球安装超过55套系统，巩固了Targan在自动雏鸡性别鉴定技术领域的领先地位。

Redondos S.A.成立于1973年，是一家综合性禽肉和猪肉生产商，业务涵盖从饲料生产到加工和分销的全价值链。
contentHtml:
Targan expands into Peru through WingScan™ partnership with Redondos 
The partnership brings Targan’s technology to South America, building on its success in the US and Europe
